results.title: JIPMER enrolls India's first infant in NeoSep1 International Clinical Trial - UNITED NEWS OF INDIA
results.description: JIPMER enrolls India's first infant in NeoSep1 International Clinical Trial UNITED NEWS OF INDIA India Enrols First Newborn in Global Trial to Combat Drug-Resistant Sepsis The CSR Journal Sepsis: India Joins Global Trial To Screen Newborns For Deadly Drug-Resistant Infections Health and Me Indian newborns join global race to beat deadly drug-resistant sepsis India Today
